patches.summary: Sort map keys before hashing in cacheKey to produce a deterministic cache key.
patches.reason: Go map iteration is randomized; multi-param requests produced different keys on every call, making the 5-minute response cache always miss.

patches.summary: Guard ListIDs against SQL injection by validating resourceType via sqlite_master before interpolating into a table-name position.
patches.reason: resourceType was passed directly into fmt.Sprintf as a table name with no sanitization; a crafted value could escape the SELECT context.

patches.summary: Guard ResolveByName against SQL injection by validating matchFields entries against ^[a-zA-Z0-9_]+$ before interpolating into the json_extract path.
patches.reason: field was interpolated directly into the json_extract path expression; a crafted value like name')) OR 1=1-- could break out of the json_extract context.

patches.summary: Project equityResponse items to the flat shape novel analysis commands query before storing in writeThroughCache.
patches.reason: NSE India equity quote responses wrap data under 'equityResponse' with nested fields; writeThroughCache only handled 'results'/'data'/'items'/'id' envelopes so equity data was never persisted, causing all eight novel commands to always return empty results.
patches.validated_outcome: After running equity quote, SELECT from resources WHERE resource_type='equity' returns rows keyed symbol_YYYYMMDD with correct symbol, lastPrice, deliveryToTradedQty, varMargin, extremeLossMargin, and metadata.preOpenMarket.IEP fields. delivery-spike returns spike signals after 2+ sessions.

patches.summary: Fix resolveLocal to look up equity snapshots by symbol param rather than URL path segment.
patches.reason: The generic fallback extracted the last URL path segment (GetQuoteApi) as the store ID, but equity rows are keyed symbol_YYYYMMDD — offline fallback always returned not-found even when cached data existed.
patches.validated_outcome: equity quote --symbol RELIANCE --data-source local returns cached snapshot with source=local.

patches.summary: Pre-reserve the next request slot under the lock in AdaptiveLimiter.Wait so concurrent workers see monotonically advancing lastRequest.
patches.reason: Wait released the mutex before sleeping, letting concurrent sync workers all read the same lastRequest, sleep the same duration, and fire simultaneously — defeating the per-second rate limit.
